name: Collins 24x30 Garage Shed Plan - A Two-Tone Garage with Stone Accents & Modern Blue Trim
open_features: 24x30 Garage Shed with Classic Gable Roof
A tall, efficient roofline provides excellent overhead clearance for attic storage, loft potential, or extended workspace comfort.
Clean framing, symmetrical gable geometry, and well-organized plans make the Collins a straightforward build for any skill level.
Large double garage doors-styled in a bold blue finish-allow easy entry for vehicles, lawn tractors, tools, large equipment, and workshop materials.
A unique combination of vertical wood siding, stone lower facade, white trim, and a blue metal roof creates a sharp, polished exterior that stands out without overpowering the landscape.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Collins Garage Shed Plan - a 24x30 premium garage and workshop solution designed with modern craftsmanship, warm natural materials, and bold architectural character. Featuring a striking blue metal roof, matching garage doors, and a beautiful blend of vertical wood siding over stone accents, the Collins delivers both sophistication and everyday practicality. Whether you're building a two-vehicle garage, a large workshop, a hobby studio, or an orga...
